capex_mentions.quote: invest approximately $157 million in exchange for 75% ownership of MLTP
capex_mentions.context: Joint venture with MultiLane to serve AI Data Center equipment market test solutions
Acquisition of Quantifi Photonics, a PIC test solutions company serving AI-related markets

limitations: AI investment intensity scored 4 rather than 5: the two quantified investments ($157M JV, $127.2M acquisition) are discrete transactions rather than a disclosed multi-year AI capex program; ongoing R&D spend on AI is referenced qualitatively but not quantified.

Risk disclosure scored 4: risks are named and mechanisms described (IP loss, regulatory compliance costs, third-party vendor dependence, cybersecurity), but no quantification of risk exposure or formal named AI risk governance body beyond the general Cybersecurity Steering Committee is disclosed.
